retry_reason: Failure indicates the device or module is unavailable; retrying without change is unlikely to succeed.
contract_summary: This function acquires a reference on the given MTD device and all its parent partitions (excluding the master), plus the master's reference if CONFIG_MTD_PARTITIONED_MASTER is enabled. It also increments the module reference count and may call a hardware-specific get operation. The caller must later release each acquired reference by calling __put_mtd_device (or equivalent) when done. The function returns 0 on success; on failure (negative errno), no references are held. The caller must check the return value before using the device.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is acquiring references (kref, module, device-specific) on the MTD device and its parent chain; minimal unrelated logic besides error handling.

check.reason: kref_get(&mtd->refcnt) is called on the input parameter mtd when mtd != master, consistent with the callee's kref_get specification. The access path mtd.refcnt.refcount and type chain mtd_info--kref--refcount_t are correct.
